Setlist
Songs Played by Dave & Tim
These are the songs that have been played by Dave & Tim in chronological order. Note that there might be performances that we don't know about yet. As far as we know, 4.22.93 is the first Dave & Tim show - and we're pretty sure about that. But there was no record of the 6.13.93 Dave & Tim show before it was released in the DMBlive series. A lot of things about the earlier days are unknown, or only known to the DMB archives.

This list contains songs that were played "Dave & Tim" only. This could mean a Dave & Tim show, or they were the only two playing on a song at a full band show. We put Dave & Tim in quotes there because it does include guests at Dave & Tim shows. As always on our website: partials count as performances, while teases do not.

In a future list, we will look at songs that have not been played by Dave & Tim yet.
Song D+T Debut Venue & Location Personnel Debut? Release Notes
